name: Biome1_Island
comment: Phase-0 scale layout v4 (2026-06-11, author review round 2). Changes vs v3: (a) maldive chain MIRRORED to the WEST side - in the UE top view the spiral now runs COUNTERCLOCKWISE (south -> west -> north) as originally asked; (b) guard arenas form a RING at ~equal radius (~24000) around the citadel instead of a sequence; (c) island is BIGGER (R 40000) and GENTLE everywhere - beaches instead of cliffs, the only cliff is the citadel cape itself; (d) citadel sits on the VERY LIP of the SW cape with a land approach from the ring side; (e) pads are subtle (wide blends, no rims), A5's bowl cuts INTO the slope. Units: uu.

landscape.extent_note: 201600x201600 centered on origin; create at location (-100800,-100800,-2000)

island.cliff_note: gentle shield dome rising toward the SW cape; the ONLY cliff is the cape face under the citadel (sector ~200-250 deg from island center), everywhere else - beaches

slots.note: toss ORIGIN over water: RunLaunchPoint here (author places/tunes), forward aimed at the island center, ballistic arc lands on M1 (~7000 uu)
ON the start->center axis; player lands here from the sea toss
lighthouse = early-spiral landmark; chain heads WEST (CCW in UE view)
spiral passes under the citadel cape - permanent landmark showcase
landing on the NW rim: natural beach->terrace, terrain here is ~5300 (the original 40-50 m shoulder spec) - no pad disc, no combat
east point of the citadel ring (R~24000 from citadel); entrance faces outward (away from citadel)
north point of the citadel ring; entrance faces the shoulder side
NW point of the ring, first met from the shoulder; A5 terraces (-900) cut INTO the upslope toward the citadel at this yaw - natural amphitheater, not a pit
ON THE VERY LIP of the SW cape (160 m), cliff to the sea, gentle land approach from the ring side (NE); gate 3/3 guard antennas, permanent field until open

rules.maldive_model: AUTHOR SPEC 2026-06-11: each maldive = a micro-island barely bigger than its arena (flat top = arena bounding circle + ~900 uu rim, ~35 deg beach slope), arena DEAD-CENTER, open water between islands MANDATORY. Slope-guard arenas (ring around the citadel) are the only ones on the big island.
rules.guard_ring: guards sit at ~equal radius (~24000) from the citadel, free clear order; entrances face outward from the ring; heights 86/90/94 m - the dome toward the cape makes the ring nearly iso-height, pads sit almost flush (no pits)
rules.budget_note: start->M1 is the BALLISTIC TOSS (~7000 uu), not a valve; maldive hops ~16-18k path per the author's trajectory
rules.terrain_note: GENTLE everywhere (author: 'полого везде, пляж вместо обрыва'): wide beach aprons, soft dome toward the cape, subtle pads (wide blends, NO raised rims), no empty pad discs
